body:
Create two tiers of API access:

Tier 1 — Read-only (no cost, safe to expose):
- GET /api/student/profile
- GET /api/showcase/candidates
- GET /api/college/dashboard
- GET /api/wji/dashboard
- GET /api/stats
- GET /api/reporting/*

Tier 2 — LLM-powered (requires auth + rate limiting before enabling):
- POST /api/assistant/chat (Gemini per-message ~$0.003-0.01)
- POST /api/consulting/* (scoping agent, proposal gen ~$0.05-0.10)
- POST /api/marketing/* (content generation ~$0.05-0.10)
- POST /api/apollo/* (CRM write operations)
- POST /api/college/match (skills matching)

Tier 2 endpoints must NOT be enabled until Issue #14 (auth) is resolved.

This separation allows deploying useful data-display features immediately while keeping cost-generating features locked down.

---

## Data-Isolation Requirement (added 2026-04-14 from Ritu's product-architecture review)

In addition to the read-only / LLM-gated tier separation above, client-portal deployments get **separate databases per client** — not a shared DB with a `tenant_id` column.

Ritu's rationale: "The compliance risk of a shared database is not worth the cost savings, especially when dealing with workforce boards and state agencies. These are government-adjacent organizations that take data isolation seriously. If we ever have a cross-tenant data leak, we lose trust and we lose contracts. The extra cost of running separate databases is a small price for that peace of mind."

### What this means for this issue

- Tier 1 (read-only) connection is still a single pooled SQLAlchemy engine **per tenant DB**, not a single shared engine across all tenants.
- Tenant resolution (from Host header — see white-label issue #16) must happen before DB engine selection.
- Connection pool cache is keyed by tenant: `engines: dict[tenant_id, Engine]`.
- LLM-gated Tier 2 endpoints write only to the resolved tenant's DB.
- Waifinder-branded flagship deployment is its own tenant with its own DB — no special-case handling.

### Partner issues

- #16 — white-label runtime config (tenant resolution from Host header)
- #11 — API boundary (must route per-tenant)
- Product architecture decision 1 (data isolation), locked 2026-04-14
title: feat: separate LLM-gated endpoints from read-only endpoints
